category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Tajikistan, covering SCCT radio type approval and Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity requirements under the GOST-TR framework.

title.en: China-to-Tajikistan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (SCCT / Gosstandart)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入塔吉克斯坦：SCCT / Gosstandart合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入塔吉克斯坦：SCCT / Gosstandart合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Tajikistan requirements under SCCT (the Service for Communications, Communications and Telecommunications, Tajikistan's radio spectrum and telecom regulatory body) and Tajikstandart (National Standards Body), covering SCCT radio type approval and frequency permits, Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity under the GOST-TR framework, EMC requirements per GOST-TR / IEC CISPR standards, electrical safety for the 220-230 V / 50 Hz Type C/F grid, mandatory local importer obligations, and Tajikistan cybersecurity obligations under the Law on Information Technologies. Tajikistan is NOT a member of the EAEU — EAC marking is not applicable; a separate Tajik Certificate of Conformity is required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与塔吉克斯坦SCCT（通信、通信与信息技术服务——塔吉克斯坦无线电频谱及电信监管机构）及塔吉克标准局（国家标准机构）要求的差距对照，涵盖SCCT无线电型号核准与频率许可、GOST-TR框架下塔吉克标准局合格证书、按GOST-TR / IEC CISPR标准的电磁兼容要求、220-230V/50Hz C/F型插头电气安全、强制当地进口商义务，以及《信息技术法》下的塔吉克斯坦网络安全义务。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国——EAC标志不适用；须取得单独的塔吉克合格证书。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與塔吉克斯坦SCCT（通信、通信與信息技術服務——塔吉克斯坦無線電頻譜及電信監管機構）及塔吉克標準局（國家標準機構）要求的差距對照，涵蓋SCCT無線電型號核准與頻率許可、GOST-TR框架下塔吉克標準局合格證書、按GOST-TR / IEC CISPR標準的電磁相容要求、220-230V/50Hz C/F型插頭電氣安全、強制當地進口商義務，以及《信息技術法》下的塔吉克斯坦網路安全義務。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國——EAC標誌不適用；須取得單獨的塔吉克合格證書。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Tajikistan's regulatory framework for wireless devices is subject to change, and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (SCCT, Tajikstandart) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。塔吉克斯坦无线设备监管框架可能有所变化，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（SCCT、塔吉克标准局）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。塔吉克斯坦無線設備監管框架可能有所變化，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（SCCT、塔吉克標準局）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Tajikistan require SCCT radio type approval and a frequency permit (for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and other radio-frequency products) plus a Tajikstandart Certificate of Conformity issued by an accredited body under the GOST-TR framework. Tajikistan is NOT a member of the EAEU — EAC marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 is not applicable, and a separate Tajik conformity certificate is mandatory. The CIS Mutual Recognition Agreement on conformity assessment partially applies but does not eliminate the need for Tajik-specific documentation. Electrical safety testing must be compatible with the 220-230 V / 50 Hz Type C/F grid. A locally registered importer or authorized representative is required. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and FCC documentation are not recognized and do not substitute for SCCT or Tajikstandart approvals. Russian-language technical documentation is generally accepted.
answer_first.zh: 进入塔吉克斯坦的无线设备须取得SCCT无线电型号核准及频率许可（适用于Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及其他射频产品），以及由认可机构依据GOST-TR框架颁发的塔吉克标准局合格证书。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国——TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC标志不适用，强制要求取得单独的塔吉克合格证书。独联体（CIS）合格评定互认协议部分适用，但不免除取得塔吉克特定文件的要求。电气安全测试须符合220-230V/50Hz C/F型插头电网。须有在当地注册的进口商或授权代表。中国CCC、SRRC及FCC文件不被承认，不可替代SCCT或塔吉克标准局核准。俄语技术文件一般可被接受。
answer_first.zht: 進入塔吉克斯坦的無線設備須取得SCCT無線電型號核准及頻率許可（適用於Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及其他射頻產品），以及由認可機構依據GOST-TR框架頒發的塔吉克標準局合格證書。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國——TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC標誌不適用，強制要求取得單獨的塔吉克合格證書。獨聯體（CIS）合格評定互認協議部分適用，但不免除取得塔吉克特定文件的要求。電氣安全測試須符合220-230V/50Hz C/F型插頭電網。須有在當地註冊的進口商或授權代表。中國CCC、SRRC及FCC文件不被承認，不可替代SCCT或塔吉克標準局核准。俄語技術文件一般可被接受。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
